message:
fix: 6 correctness bugs — COUNT(col) nulls, merge offset, GROUP BY types, Welford variance, pipeStages

- sql/executor.ts: COUNT(column) now excludes nulls (was counting all rows)
- merge.ts: apply offset in unsorted multi-fragment merge path (was ignored)
- partial-agg.ts: GROUP BY keys use null sentinel to distinguish null from ""
- partial-agg.ts: finalize restores numeric types for group-by column values
- partial-agg.ts: Welford's online algorithm for variance/stddev (was naive sum-of-squares with catastrophic cancellation)
- partial-agg.ts: parallel Welford merge (delta^2 * nA * nB / (nA + nB))
- operators.ts: buildPipeline now applies pipeStages (was only in buildEdgePipeline)
